Class CoronaResultFunctionality

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.DiseaseResultFunctionality
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.CoronaResultFunctionality
public class CoronaResultFunctionality extends DiseaseResultFunctionality
This class contains all the functions that could be important in several of the sub-logics (current, cumulative and temporal)

  • Constructor Details

    • CoronaResultFunctionality

      public CoronaResultFunctionality()

  • Method Details

    • generateCrosstabList

      public static List<String[]> generateCrosstabList(Map<TreatmentLevels, List<MiiEncounter>> mapCumulativeMaxTreatments, List<MiiPatient> listPatient)
      Creation of a cross table listing the current patients at the UKB site according to current level of care and place of residence in Bonn or outside Bonn.
      Parameters:
      mapCumulativeMaxTreatments - Map with the current inpatient c19 positive cases and their maxtreatment level
      listPatient - List with the patient data for the given encounter
      Returns:
      List with the crosstab states and their values

    • generateCurrentTreatmentLevelList

      public static void generateCurrentTreatmentLevelList(Map<String, List<String>> mapCurrentTreatmentlevelCasenrs, String exportDirectory, String fileBaseName)
      Export of a csv file that displays a list of case/encounter numbers of active cases separated by treatment level when run through.
      Parameters:
      mapCurrentTreatmentlevelCasenrs - Map with the current case/encounter ids by treatment level.
      exportDirectory - The directory to export to (e.g.: "C:\currentTreatmentlevelExport").
      fileBaseName - The base file name of the generated file (e.g.: "Caseids_inpatient_covid19_patients").

    • incrementVariantCount

      public static void incrementVariantCount(Map<String,Integer> variantMap, String variantName)
      Increase the passed covid variant frequency by one.
      Parameters:
      variantMap - Map that assigns the variant names, their (current) frequency.
      variantName - Name of the variant (As defined in the ValueSet of the corresponding Data item).
